description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a modern, minimalist design, primarily finished in white. The headband is padded and smoothly curved, connecting to two large, circular ear cups that are also cushioned for comfort. The ear cups are attached to adjustable arms, allowing for a customized fit, and the hinges suggest some degree of foldability or rotation. The headphones feature visible joints and screws, indicating robust construction, and the overall build appears to be a mix of plastic and metal components. There are no visible wires, suggesting a wireless design, and no branding or logos are apparent on the exterior. The headphones are designed for personal audio use and are suitable for portable, on-the-go listening in urban environments.
description: A pair of modern, white over-ear headphones with padded ear cups and headband, featuring adjustable arms and a sleek, wireless design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both padded ear cups and the curved headband, highlighting the symmetrical design.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying the headband's width and the circular shape of the ear cups, with visible adjustment arms.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the back of the ear cups and the headband's smooth curve.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the ear cups and the headband padding, with hinge details visible.
